description: Add a notification center with persisted read state.

userStories.title: Persist notification read state
userStories.description: As a user, I want notification read state to persist across sessions so that my inbox stays consistent.
acceptanceCriteria: Notification read state is stored persistently
Read state survives across sessions
Typecheck passes
Tests pass

userStories.title: Show unread badge and notification list
userStories.description: As a user, I want an unread badge and a notification list so that I can see new activity quickly.
acceptanceCriteria: The notification center shows unread badge state
The notification list opens and displays notifications
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using playwright-cli skill

userStories.title: Update notification read state backend
userStories.description: As a user, I want notification read state updates to persist so that read and unread changes are saved.
acceptanceCriteria: Notifications can be marked read or unread
The chosen read state is persisted for each notification
Typecheck passes
Tests pass

userStories.title: Add read and unread controls in notification list
userStories.description: As a user, I want read and unread controls in the notification list so that I can change status inline.
acceptanceCriteria: Each notification row exposes read and unread controls
Using the controls updates the selected notification state
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using playwright-cli skill

userStories.title: Filter notifications by read state
userStories.description: As a user, I want to filter notifications by read state so that I can focus on unread work.
acceptanceCriteria: Notifications can be filtered by read state
Filter results only show matching read or unread items
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using playwright-cli skill

userStories.title: Clear all read notifications
userStories.description: As a user, I want to clear read notifications so that I can keep the list tidy.
acceptanceCriteria: Clearing read notifications removes all currently read items
Unread notifications remain in the list
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using playwright-cli skill
